meta.criteria: rated 8.0+ (average movie: 6.13) with 5,000-50,000 votes, non-adult, 60+ min runtime

movies.title: Mission C1000
movies.pitch: Brand new and riding a devoted early fanbase. Ratings this fresh usually settle as votes pile up.

movies.title: The Chaos Class
movies.pitch: Turkey's most beloved comedy: a classroom of lovable slackers vs. an unforgettable teacher. A national treasure, invisible to the West.

movies.title: Ramayana: The Legend of Prince Rama
movies.pitch: An Indo-Japanese anime retelling of the Ramayana, gorgeous, earnest, and decades ahead of its cross-cultural moment.

movies.title: Attack on Titan: The Last Attack
Mayabazar
movies.pitch: A 1957 Telugu fantasy so beloved it was colorized 50 years later and packed theaters again. Movie magic, literally.

movies.title: Sandesham
movies.pitch: A Malayalam satire about two brothers whose party politics tear a family apart. Sharper about politics than most films twice its budget.

movies.title: David Attenborough: A Life on Our Planet
movies.pitch: Attenborough's witness statement: one man, one lifetime, the whole planet changing beneath him.

movies.title: Tosun Pasha
movies.pitch: Kemal Sunal at his peak: a pasha mix-up comedy Turkey can quote line for line.

movies.title: O.J.: Made in America
movies.pitch: Eight hours on O.J., race, and America. Won the Oscar, then most people never watched it.

movies.title: The Message
movies.pitch: The story of Islam's origins told without ever showing the Prophet, a technical and dramatic feat.

movies.title: Kireedam
movies.pitch: A father watches the future he built for his son collapse in one act of violence. Malayalam cinema's quiet heartbreaker.

movies.title: The Unnamed
movies.pitch: A Bangladeshi drama about an unidentified migrant worker's body and everyone who failed him.

movies.title: Dominion
movies.pitch: An animal-farming documentary built on hidden-camera footage. Polarizing by design, devoted by result.

movies.title: The Foster Brothers
movies.pitch: Milk brothers, mistaken identities, and Kemal Sunal chaos. Another Turkish comedy classic the algorithm never learned.

movies.title: The Marathon Family
movies.pitch: A Yugoslav black comedy about a family of undertakers. Quoted across the Balkans to this day.

movies.title: C/o Kancharapalem
movies.pitch: An anthology of small lives in one Andhra town, made with non-actors and enormous heart.

movies.title: The Phantom of the Opera at the Royal Albert Hall
movies.pitch: The Phantom staged at the Royal Albert Hall for its 25th anniversary, the definitive filmed version.

movies.title: Monpura
movies.pitch: A Bangladeshi folk-musical tragedy that had an entire country humming its soundtrack.

movies.title: The Human Condition III: A Soldier's Prayer
movies.pitch: The final movement of Kobayashi's nine-hour anti-war epic, a Japanese soldier walking home through the ruins of empire.

movies.title: Natsamrat
movies.pitch: A retired stage legend gives away everything and learns what gratitude is worth. Marathi cinema's King Lear.

movies.title: Les Misérables in Concert: The 25th Anniversary
movies.pitch: The 25th-anniversary Les Mis concert with a cast for the ages. The barricade, distilled.

movies.title: Nadodikkattu
movies.pitch: Two broke dreamers drift through Kerala scheming their way up. Malayalam comedy at its most quotable.
